app.name: Music to MIDI
app.subtitle: Intelligently convert music to MIDI files

cli.self_test_miros: Check MIROS availability without opening the GUI
cli.miros_worker: Internal MIROS worker mode used by the desktop app

startup.self_test_loading_yourmt3_model: Self-test is loading the YourMT3+ model
startup.detected_4k_passthrough: Detected a 4K display; using PassThrough DPI rounding policy
startup.install_pyqt_hint: Error: PyQt6 is required. Install it with: pip install PyQt6

dropzone.title: Drop audio file here, or click to select
dropzone.subtitle: Supports MP3, WAV, FLAC, OGG, M4A

mode.label: Processing Mode
mode.smart_tooltip: Direct full-mix transcription with either the official YourMT3+ checkpoint route or the MIROS MusicFM challenge-SOTA route
mode.vocal_split_tooltip: Only extract vocals with Leap XE and accompaniment with PolarFormer; then choose a multi-instrument or piano model on each waveform as needed
mode.six_stem_split_tooltip: Only separate bass / drums / guitar / piano / vocals / other WAV files; then choose a model per track as needed
mode.piano_transkun_tooltip: Use the dedicated TransKun piano model for pure piano audio
mode.piano_transkun_v2_aug_tooltip: Transcribe solo piano with the official TransKun V2 data-augmentation checkpoint
mode.piano_aria_amt_tooltip: Use the dedicated Aria-AMT piano model for pure piano audio
mode.piano_bytedance_pedal_tooltip: Use ByteDance's pedal-aware piano model for pure piano audio
mode.smart_hint:
Transcribe full audio directly with either the official YourMT3+ checkpoint route or MIROS MusicFM.
When MIROS is selected, the YourMT3+ model-mode selector is not used; output is GM multi-instrument MIDI.
mode.smart_yourmt3_hint:
Uses YourMT3+ model assets published or used by TelkNet and follows its current public website checkpoint/output contract; it is not claimed to match current public TelkNet master line for line because the linked repository lags the website contract.
Full mix -> selected official checkpoint -> GM multi-instrument MIDI.
mode.smart_miros_hint:
Uses the MIROS backend published or used by TelkNet and follows its current public website output contract; it is not claimed to match current public TelkNet master line for line because the linked repository lags the website contract.
This is the first-place route from the 2025 AI4Musician Automatic Music Transcription Challenge; the model-mode selector is not part of this chain.
mode.vocal_split_hint: Both models process the original mix and retain the vocals and accompaniment WAV files. No MIDI model is loaded or run during separation. Afterward, choose YourMT3+, MIROS, or a dedicated piano model independently on each track.
mode.six_stem_split_hint: Always generates and retains real bass, drums, guitar, piano, vocals, and other WAV files. It does not automatically transcribe or merge MIDI; choose any supported model per track afterward.
mode.piano_transkun_hint: Best for pure piano audio. Uses TransKun packaged pretrained resources.
mode.piano_transkun_v2_aug_desc: 🎹  TransKun V2 Aug  —  Data-Augmented Piano Transcription
mode.piano_transkun_v2_aug_hint: Best for pure piano audio. Uses the official checkpointTransformerAug / checkpointMSimplerAug weights as a route independent from default TransKun.
mode.piano_aria_amt_hint: Best for pure piano audio. Expects the Aria-AMT checkpoint to be bundled or present in the model directory.
mode.piano_bytedance_pedal_hint: Best for pure piano audio. Preserves sustain pedal CC64; expects the ByteDance Piano checkpoint to be bundled or present in the model directory.

engine.dedicated_mode_hint: Dedicated piano modes use the selected piano model directly and skip the multi-instrument backend.
engine.manual_split_midi_hint: Separation only generates WAV files. Afterward, each track can independently use YourMT3+ (including checkpoint choice), MIROS, TransKun, TransKun V2 Aug, Aria-AMT, or ByteDance Pedal.
engine.yourmt3_tooltip: Official YourMT3+ Space / Colab-style route; the concrete checkpoint / architecture is controlled by the YourMT3+ model mode.
engine.yourmt3_midi_tooltip: This is only the post-separation MIDI backend; it does not perform vocal or six-stem audio separation.
engine.yourmt3_general_hint: Uses YourMT3+ model assets published or used by TelkNet and follows its current public website checkpoint contract; the linked public master lags that contract, so source parity is not claimed. Full mix -> selected official checkpoint -> GM multi-instrument MIDI.
engine.yourmt3_six_stem_hint: Six-stem separation is fixed to BS-RoFormer SW Fixed. The selected YourMT3+ checkpoint independently transcribes the real bass/drums/guitar/piano/vocals/other stems into their MIDI files.
engine.vocal_split_yourmt3_midi_hint: Vocal separation is fixed to Leap XE vocals + PolarFormer accompaniment. The selected YourMT3+ checkpoint only transcribes the two real stems.
engine.miros_tooltip: First-place system in the 2025 AI4Musician Automatic Music Transcription Challenge, using the official MIROS MusicFM multi-decoder route. Requires a local ai4m-miros checkout and runtime dependencies.
engine.miros_general_hint: Uses the MIROS backend shown on TelkNet's current public website; the linked public master lags that contract, so source parity is not claimed. Full mix -> MIROS MusicFM multi-decoder -> GM multi-instrument MIDI; the model-mode selector is hidden.
engine.miros_six_stem_hint: Six-stem separation is fixed to BS-RoFormer SW Fixed. MIROS independently transcribes the real bass/drums/guitar/piano/vocals/other stems into their MIDI files.
engine.vocal_split_miros_midi_hint: Vocal separation is fixed to Leap XE vocals + PolarFormer accompaniment. MIROS only transcribes the two real stems.
engine.yourmt3_model_tooltip: YourMT3+ checkpoint / architecture selector shared by SMART, vocal split, and six-stem modes. A missing selected checkpoint fails explicitly.

status.cancelling: Cancelling; waiting for the current inference to stop safely…

app.title: Music to MIDI
app.subtitle: Intelligently convert music to editable MIDI files

ui.audio_input: Drop audio file here, or click to select
ui.audio_hint: Supports MP3, WAV, FLAC, OGG, M4A (automatically converted to WAV for processing)
ui.vocal_split_merge_midi: Output 1 merged vocal+accompaniment MIDI (vocal split mode)
ui.zerogpu_note: (ZeroGPU short clips only; sign-in is currently required: free accounts get 5 GPU minutes/day, while the anonymous 2-minute quota is below the conservative minimum request; requests beyond one platform-adjusted window are rejected before processing)
ui.download_label: Click to download after conversion finishes

mode.smart_info: **Multi-Instrument MIDI** — Run full-mix AMT directly. Choose the official YourMT3+ checkpoint route or the MIROS MusicFM multi-decoder challenge-SOTA route; MIROS does not show or use the YourMT3+ model-mode selector.
mode.vocal_split_info: **Leap XE vocals + PolarFormer accompaniment + MIDI** — Aligned with the models and input/output contract used by TelkNet's current public tool, without claiming to reproduce its server implementation or source line for line. Both models process the original mix directly, then the selected YourMT3+ checkpoint or MIROS transcribes each stem. Vocal and accompaniment MIDI files are always written; merged MIDI is optional. Separated WAV files are enabled by default and can be disabled.
mode.six_stem_split_info: **BS-RoFormer SW 6-stem + per-stem MIDI** — Uses separation assets published or used by TelkNet/MVSep and follows TelkNet's current public website per-stem YourMT3+ / MIROS contract; the linked public master lags that contract, so line-for-line source parity is not claimed. Always writes six stem MIDI files and one merged MIDI. The six stem WAV files are enabled by default and can be disabled.
mode.piano_transkun_info: **TransKun (Piano)** — Dedicated transcription model for solo piano audio, directly outputs piano MIDI.
mode.piano_transkun_v2_aug_info: **TransKun V2 Aug (Piano)** — Independent piano route using the official data-augmentation checkpoint, downloaded and strictly verified on first use.
mode.piano_aria_amt_info: **Aria-AMT (Piano)** — Dedicated transcription model for solo piano scenarios. The Aria-AMT checkpoint is prepared on first use.
mode.piano_bytedance_pedal_info: **ByteDance Pedal (Piano)** — Pedal-aware transcription for solo piano audio. Preserves sustain pedal CC64.

error.upload_required: Please upload an audio file first
error.zerogpu_clip_too_long: This audio exceeds the ZeroGPU short-clip contract: {duration:.1f}s of audio has a conservative {estimate:.0f}s GPU estimate after the platform GPU-size multiplier, above the {limit}s single logged-in free-account window. Shorten the clip or use Colab, the desktop build, or dedicated GPU hardware; the app will not present a full-song run as fitting the free quota.

status.output_retention: Downloads enter expiration cleanup after {hours:g} hours; failed jobs are removed immediately and this instance's results are removed on normal process exit.

progress.yourmt3_oom_retry_applied: OOM retry applied: initial batch={initial_batch}, final batch={final_batch}
progress.yourmt3_vram_retry: VRAM is insufficient: initial batch={initial_batch}, lowered to batch={final_batch} and retrying
progress.running_miros_elapsed: Running MIROS inference... elapsed {seconds}s, waiting for {output}
progress.loading_vocal_separator: Preparing vocal/accompaniment separation: Leap XE first, then PolarFormer...
progress.separation_model_switching: {from_model} ({from_role}) complete; saving WAV and switching to the {to_model} ({to_role}) model: {model_file}...
progress.audio_chunk_running: Running inference: {model} ({role}) audio chunk {current}/{total}; model {model_file}; {engine}; ~{chunk_seconds}s/chunk with ~{overlap_seconds}s adjacent overlap; not workflow stages or retries
progress.audio_chunk_progress: Audio chunk progress: {model} {role} {done}/{total} (~{chunk_seconds}s/chunk, ~{overlap_seconds}s adjacent overlap; not workflow stages or retries)
progress.cpu_retry: Detected an unsupported NVIDIA GPU architecture, retrying on CPU...
